ic_1_name.title: District 1 nickname
ic_1_name.description: Short friendly name for this district (e.g. "Springfield"). Used as the `district` argument on tool calls.

ic_1_base_url.title: District 1 base URL (https://...)
ic_1_base_url.description: Campus Parent portal base URL, e.g. https://campus.springfield.k12.example.us

ic_1_district.title: District 1 app name
ic_1_district.description: Infinite Campus district app name (the appName path segment in the portal URL).

ic_1_username.title: District 1 username
ic_1_username.description: Campus Parent portal username for this district.

ic_1_password.title: District 1 password
ic_1_password.description: Campus Parent portal password for this district.
